bird.name: Willard's sooty boubou
bird.summary: Willard's sooty boubou (Laniarius willardi) is a species of bird in the family Malaconotidae, native to the Albertine Rift montane forests.…

locations.name: Albertine Rift montane forests
locations.summary: The Albertine Rift montane forests (French: Forêts montagnardes du Rift Albertin) is a tropical moist broadleaf forest…
